extra.reason: Done-but-open drift: Phase 2 shipped — re-tracked and closed under the later Phases-2-4 epic (children 0h0.1-0h0.4). Evidence in-tree: nexus/core/providers/{base,ollama_provider,anthropic_provider,openai_provider,vertex_provider}.py, nexus/core/router.py (NEXUS_MODE local|cloud|hybrid routing), nexus/core/policy.py (snippet-only redaction). Commits 487b065 (router+policy) et seq.; released in v1.1.0 Hybrid Cloud Upgrade (tag e4a0e53).

Done-but-open drift: Phase 3 shipped — re-tracked and closed under the later Phases-2-4 epic (0h0.5 run ledger, 0h0.6 workspace API). Evidence in-tree: nexus/core/ledger.py (SQLite RunLedger with run_id/timestamps/model_used/hashes), workspace-scoped Chroma collections in nexus/core/rag_pipeline.py, headless API nexus/api/server.py (POST /query, POST /index, GET /health plus /workspaces and /runs). Released in v1.1.0 (tag e4a0e53; release report 000-docs/501-REPT-nexus-release-v1.1.0.md).

Done-but-open drift: Phase 4 shipped — re-tracked and closed under the later Phases-2-4 epic (0h0.7 unit tests, 0h0.8 integration/API tests, 0h0.9 CI updates). Evidence in-tree: 03-Tests/test_{router,policy,ledger,api,integration,smoke,streamlit_smoke,imports}.py; commits e4b5ec4 (Phase 4.1), f7f2d64 (Phase 4.2), 63f29c7 (Phase 4.3); .github/workflows/{ci,test,release}.yml. Released in v1.1.0 (tag e4a0e53).

Done-but-open drift: the NEXUS Hybrid Cloud Upgrade shipped end-to-end as v1.1.0 (tag e4a0e53, release report 000-docs/501-REPT-nexus-release-v1.1.0.md, AAR 000-docs/006-AA-REPT-nexus-hybrid-cloud-team-upgrade.md). Phases 0/1/5 (v2b.1, v2b.2, v2b.6) were closed earlier; Phases 2/3/4 closed today against the in-tree nexus/ package, 03-Tests/, and CI — the same scope was also fully tracked and closed under the duplicate Phases-2-4 epic (local-rag-agent-0h0, 10/10 children closed). The snippets-only hard constraint is enforced in nexus/core/policy.py.
Filed 000-docs/007-AA-AUDR-architecture-audit.md (grounded good/broken/drift findings + invariants + gap-to-phase map + bead cluster mapping); indexed in 000-INDEX.md; next-seq bumped to 008.

Added PEP 621 pyproject.toml (ruff+mypy+pytest+coverage config, provider/dev/ui extras, testpaths=03-Tests); rewrote ci.yml (install via extras, lint job, unit/integration split by marker, corrected release body slug+install); deleted duplicate test.yml + stray 05-Scripts/pytest.ini; fixed test_api version assertion 1.0.0->1.1.0; marked test_api/test_integration as integration; added .pre-commit-config.yaml; fixed release.yml heredoc YAML-syntax error; actionlint shows no errors (only pre-existing info-level SC2086 in release.yml). Runtime unit-gate goes green after the rag-pipeline import fix (local-6p0.4).

Added ProviderCapabilities/CostProfile/PrivacyProfile + ProviderHealth (profiles.py); ABC concrete defaults + is_local + health_check (base.py); per-provider profile overrides (ollama is_local=True with a light reachability ping; openai/anthropic/vertex cloud profiles + cost); OpenAI Responses API path (use_responses_api); new OpenAICompatibleLLMProvider (base-url configurable: OpenRouter/Together/vLLM/LM Studio, caller-declared locality); router get_llm_with_fallback (preferred->fallbacks->local-emergency); config openai_compatible enum + base-url/model/is_local + NEXUS_LLM_FALLBACK + validate() check. Config.validate() now called in pipeline init. Fallback tests green.

Replaced the truncator PolicyRedactor with PolicyEngine: NexusMode-driven single gate on ALL outbound (guard_llm + guard_embedding). LOCAL blocks any external call incl. embeddings (fail-closed); HYBRID forces local embeddings + refuses secret-bearing payloads; CLOUD explicit but still refuses secrets. Real PII redaction (email/ssn/phone/cc) + high-confidence secret scan (aws/openai/anthropic/google/github/slack/private-key) returning pattern NAMES not values. prepare_context redacts PII + caps + attributes; payload inspector -> PolicyDecision(provider,model,chars,tokens,chunk ids,hashes,redactions,secret hits,decision) with as_receipt(); PolicyViolation on block. Added PrivacyReceipt model on QueryResponse. 22 policy unit tests green.

Fixed the embedding abstraction: added _ABCEmbeddingAdapter (LangChain Embeddings over the provider ABC) so Chroma consumes embed_documents/embed_query uniformly — OpenAI/Vertex embeddings no longer crash on the Ollama-only private _get_embeddings(). Also fixed the langchain.text_splitter->langchain_text_splitters import (dep drift, langchain 1.3). Routed BOTH the index embed step and the query question-embed through policy.guard_embedding (fail-closed), and the LLM call through policy.guard_llm; prepare_context for redaction/capping; explicit untrusted-context boundary + insufficient-evidence refusal in the prompt; builds a PrivacyReceipt per query; retriever.invoke (langchain 1.x). Verified: OpenAI embed path indexes via real chromadb with no AttributeError.

Added 03-Tests/test_privacy_gate.py (8 E2E tests with in-process fakes): OpenAI embed path indexes via real chromadb with no AttributeError; LOCAL mode makes zero network calls (socket-blocked) + blocks cloud providers; sentinel AWS-key secret blocked before the cloud LLM call AND before the cloud embedding call (assert generate/embed never invoked); provider fallback skips erroring + unavailable preferred. Rewrote test_policy.py -> 22 PolicyEngine tests (redaction, secret scan, mode matrix, receipt). Repaired latent router tests (patch Config, not os.environ, which is read at import). Full unit gate: 62 passed, 4 skipped, exit 0; ruff clean.

Fixed naming/identity + stripped overclaims. README.md + CLAUDE.md rewritten to the honest local-first BYOK positioning with the canonical trio (dir local-rag-agent / remote iam-local-rag / product Intent NEXUS), install via git clone iam-local-rag + pip install -e, doc guidance repointed to 000-docs/ (removed .directory-standards.md / claudes-docs / 01-Docs refs). Replaced the marketing 000-docs/003 (deleted the fabricated HIPAA-healthcare-client line + fabricated metrics; no compliance claims). CHANGELOG compliance lines softened to 'designed for privacy'. grep confirms no surviving HIPAA/GDPR/SOC2/healthcare-client CLAIMS or nexus-rag slug in live docs (only disclaimers + the audit's description of the removal).

Quarantined legacy apps to 99-Archive (git mv app.py, app_optimized.py, load_test.py, performance_analysis.py) with a 99-Archive/README.md explaining each; kept 02-Src/app_nexus.py working. Archived the two 01-Docs dated reports (500/501) and removed the now-empty 01-Docs dir; neutralized their GDPR/HIPAA/SOC2 claims + added ARCHIVED banners. Repointed the 5 legacy-coupled tests: test_imports.py + test_streamlit_smoke.py now test the nexus package + parse app_nexus.py (no legacy app.py/app_optimized dependency) — they run (not skip) and pass. Unit gate 65 passed.

Ran /audit-tests + /implement-tests (proportionate for an early-stage service/api+library). Diagnostic: TEST_AUDIT.md (grade B-, service/api+library, 60% unit coverage, L1-L4 present, L5-L7 waived). Installed the IS wall in-repo: intent-audit-harness + radon in pyproject .[dev]; coverage ratchet floor 55 enforced in CI test job; CI harness job (verify + bias + escape-scan); pre-commit escape-scan hook; .harness-hash manifest; tests/TESTING.md policy doc. escape-scan --staged clean; coverage 60.49% >= 55. L5-L7 (perf/sec/BDD/UAT + RTM) waived early-stage, tracked as roadmap beads.

PR #12 merged (squash 3489da7). Mutation gate (mutmut, --use-coverage, citation_verifier baseline 10/20), truthful CRAP in CI (radon-on-PATH), coverage floor 55->65, audit doc 009, machine-readable escape-scan floors (fixed a silently-crashing gate). All 7 checks green; 3 Gemini comments addressed across 2 review rounds.

PR #13 merged (squash). All 8 secret + 4 PII patterns parametrized (positive+near-miss), provider adapters behaviorally tested (SDK-mocked, 39 tests), ABC locality+health-check contract, cite-success unit test, single-gate AST guard. Coverage 69->78%, providers 20-23->58-82%, CRAP truthful via coverage.json (43->4 nexus blockers), floor 65->75. 182 tests green. 2 Gemini comments (relative-path guard bug + robust mock) fixed.
